settings.heading: Shop ready-to-order shirt collections.
settings.intro: Retail collections are the quick checkout lane for simple shirt designs. Custom apparel, uniforms, team stores and bulk orders should still start with a quote.

settings.heading: Custom apparel, promotional products and retail shirts from one local shop.
settings.intro: L F Graphco helps schools, booster clubs, churches, teams, municipalities and businesses move from idea to finished apparel with quote guidance, artwork support and production options.

settings.heading: Have a logo or design ready?
settings.intro: Upload artwork notes or share a file link so L F Graphco can review placement, decoration method, garment choices and quote details.

settings.heading: Tell us what you need and when you need it.
settings.intro: Share your project type, quantity and deadline. L F Graphco will help you move from idea to quote-ready details fast.

settings.heading: Popular starting-price packages.
settings.intro: Start with a package, then call 972-840-8337, request a quote or upload artwork for final pricing.
